candidates.description: Ray-marched SDF scene with repeated boxes, a morphing sphere/octahedron, and a camera that flies through the scene.
Animated mandelbox-style fractal rendered with ray-marching and ambient occlusion.
Ocean ray-march with octave wave noise by TDM (2014). Iteratively builds up wave height using noise octaves.
Compact demoscene shader by Danilo Guanabara -- three-channel spiral rings using polar UV distortion.
Orthographic ray-march of a grid of SDF boxes using opRep domain repetition.
Educational ray-marching tutorial rendering a single SDF cube with Phong shading and configurable camera.
